message:
fix: standardize status color shades in PersistenceSection (#4101)

PersistenceSection was using -500 shade status colors (text-green-500,
text-red-500, text-yellow-500) while every other settings section uses
-400 shades consistently. This standardizes all 5 occurrences to match
the codebase convention: text-green-400, text-red-400, text-yellow-400.

Closes #3890

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
